05 = Patient unresponsive or unable to speak. CHAR 2 x x
M0420_FREQ_PAIN (M0420) Frequency of Pain Frequency of pain interfering with patient's activity or movement. 00 = Patient has no pain or pain does not interfere with activity or movement.
01 = Less often than daily.
02 = Daily, but not constantly.
03 = All of the time. CHAR 2 x x
M0430_INTRACT_PAIN (M0430)
